title: Roof Restoration Cranbourne South
content:
Roof Restoration Cranbourne South

We offer everything from roof repairs and restoration services, gutter repairs and installation, and more to the people of Cranbourne South. Better yet, our skilled team are experienced with all types of materials. If you have a terracotta-tiled roof, a cement-tiled roof, Colorbond roofing, or a flat metal roof, our team can help with your restoration or repair.

At Sandhurst Roofing, we employ hard-working, honest roof plumbers and tilers. We ensure that you are met with roofers who are highly qualified and knowledgeable for every type of roofing project.

Get a Free Quote!

Gutter Repairs Cranbourne South

Keeping your property waterproof relies heavily on maintaining your gutters. One of the most critical components of your roof is the guttering; gutters take water and carry it away from the roof and house. By removing all excess water, gutters help prevent the growth of mould, the rotting of roof and house structural components, leaks that can cause ceiling sagging, and much more.

Maintenance, repair and sometimes even replacement of gutters can be crucial to keeping a roof healthy. That's why we use the most durable and reliable materials, like Colorbond Steel, for all guttering jobs. COLORBOND® steel will not only last for years due to its durability, but it will also work well with the home's existing design and colour palette. For all your guttering solutions, or to have any questions answered, call us today on 0448 812 800.

Get a Free Quote!

Experience Comprehensive Roof and Gutter Repairs

Wwhether you’re looking for gutter repairs, roof restoration or re-roofing we’ve got you sorted. All our services are fully insured, and every one of our tradespeople is a registered roofer and roof plumbers. Giving you peace of mind that your roof restoration or repairs will be of the highest quality and standard.

Sandhurst Roofing is proud to be a family-owned and operated business with over 30 years of experience. Since then, we have grown to become one of Melbourne’s leading roofing companies. Our expert team take the time to discuss your specific requirements so that you know what’s going on every step of the way.

We give all our clients honest advice to the people of Cranbourne South, as well as giving you insight into the job at hand. We also supply competitive quotes! Is it time to experience the Sandhurst difference? Call us today on 0448 812 800.

What Our Customers Say

Steve and his team did a fabulous job, I was away working whilst the work was in process , but saw the progress for each of the first two days in the evening and on the third day the final touches were done. The work looks first rate and all of the old gutter was removed very neatly without any drama or mess. It was a pleasure to deal with Steve who was very friendly and accommodating, plus the price was considerably cheaper than that quoted by a rival company. I’m now just waiting for it to rain!
